subcodes.first_line: O Divine Providence, O forgiving Lord! How can I ever befittingly sing Thy praise or sufficiently worship and glorify Thee… O Divine Providence, Thou art the Ever-Forgiving! O Thou Almighty God, Thou art the Gracious
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا آمرزگارا چگونه زبان بستایشت گشایم و پرستش و نیایش نمایم تقریر عین
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @soul; spirit after death, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
